name: Smooth and Tasty Kidney Bean Dip
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Cooked AM Kidney Beans (1-1/2 cups dried)
8 ounces Cream cheese OR 1 cup Creamy tofu
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a blender or food processor.
2. Blend until smooth and creamy.
3. Serve with fresh vegetable pieces or tortilla chips.
